blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,230 ft. Looking ahead, 50 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Tuesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
